label: GCP VM: Check & Update OS (Direct)
command: ssh -i C:/Users/Jason van Ravenswaay/.ssh/google_compute_engine "jvr@aosanctuary.com@35.192.46.16" "uname -a && (lsb_release -a 2>/dev/null || cat /etc/os-release) && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo apt list --upgradable"
